message:
refactor: Simplify xml_mod and typing_extensions_mod with helpers

- xml_mod.zig: Replace genFromstring with h.discard() (4 lines saved)
- typing_extensions_mod.zig: Replace genCast with h.passN(), remove unused ast import (5 lines saved)

Total: 9 lines saved, 6204→6195 lines
